createMockArrivals(\n173\t  stationId: string,\n174\t  lines: string[],\n175\t  count: number = 3,\n176\t  options: {\n177\t    delayMinutes?: number;\n178\t    isRerouted?: boolean;\n179\t    confidence?: \"high\" | \"low\";\n180\t  } = {}\n181\t) {\n182\t  const now = Date.now() / 1000;\n183\t  const arrivals: ArrivalTime[] = [];\n184\t\n185\t  for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n186\t : 0),\n191\t        minutesAway: i * 2 + (options.delayMinutes ?? 0),\n192\t        isAssigned: true,\n193\t        isRerouted: options.isRerouted ?? false,\n194\t        isExpress: false,\n195\t        tripId: `${line}-${stationId}-${i}`,\n196\t        destination: \"Test Destination\",\n197\t        confidence: options.confidence ?? \"high\",\n198\t        feedName: \"test\",\n199\t        feedAge: 5,\n200\t      });\n201\t    }\n202\t  }\n203\t\n204\t  return {\n205\t    stationId,\n206\t    stationName: TEST_STATIONS[stationId]?.name ?? \"Test Station\",\n207\t    updatedAt: now,\n208\t    feedAge: 5,\n209\t    northbound: arrivals,\n210\t    southbound: [],\n211\t    alerts: [],\n212\t  };\n213\t}\n214\t\n215\t// [\"1\", \"2\", \"3\"], walkingSeconds: 120, accessible: true }],\n};\n\n// Helper to create mock arrivals\nfunction createMockArrivals(\n  stationId: string,\n  lines: string[],\n  count: number = 3,\n  options: {\n    delayMinutes?: number;\n    isRerouted?: boolean;\n    confidence?: \"high\" | \"low\";\n  } = {}\n) {\n  const now = Date.now() / 1000;\n  const arrivals: ArrivalTime[] = [];\n\n  for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n    for (const line of lines) {\n      arrivals.push({\n        line,\n        direction: \"N\",\n        arrivalTime: now + i * 120 + (options.delayMinutes ? options.delayMinutes * 60 : 0),\n        minutesAway: i * 2 + (options.delayMinutes ?? 0),\n        isAssigned: true,\n        isRerouted: options.isRerouted ?? false,\n        isExpress: false,\n        tripId: `${line}-${stationId}-${i}`,\n        destination: \"Test Destination\",\n        confidence: options.confidence ?? \"high\",\n        feedName: \"test\",\n        feedAge: 5,\n      });\n    }\n  }\n\n  return {\n    stationId,\n    stationName: TEST_STATIONS[stationId]?.name ?? \"Test Station\",\n    updatedAt: now,\n    feedAge: 5,\n    northbound: arrivals,\n    southbound: [],\n    alerts: [],\n  };\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Tests\n// vi.mocked(getStationsWithBrokenElevators).mockReturnValue(new Set());\n\n      const accessibleEngine = new TransferEngine({\n        stations: TEST_STATIONS,\n        routes: TEST_ROUTES,\n        transfers: TEST_TRANSFERS,\n        complexes: TEST_COMPLEXES,\n        getArrivals: (stationId) => {\n          return createMockArrivals(stationId, [\"1\", \"A\"], 3);\n        },\n      });\n\n describe(\"Confidence calculation\", () => {\n    it(\"returns low confidence with stale data\", () => {\n      const staleEngine = new TransferEngine({\n        stations: TEST_STATIONS,\n });\n\n      const result = staleEngine.analyzeCommute(\"101\", \"725\");\n\n      // With feedAge of 5 minutes, confidence should be lower\n      expect(result.recommendationDetails.confidence).toBeDefined();\n    });\n\n    it(\"returns high confidence with fresh data\", () => {\n      const result = engine.analyzeCommute(\"101\",     if (result.directRoutes.length > 0 && result.transferRoutes.length > 0) {\n        const bestTransfer = result.transferRoutes[0];\n        expect(bestTransfer.timeSavedVsDirect).toBeDefined();\n      }\n    });\n\n    it(\"recommends transfer when it saves significant time\", () => {\n      const transferSavesEngine = new TransferEngine({\n        stations: TEST_STATIONS,\n        routes: TEST_ROUTES,\n        transfers: TEST_TRANSFERS,\n        complexes: TEST_COMPLEXES,\n        getArrivals: (stationId) => {\n          const now = Date.now() / 1000;\n          if (stationId === \"101\") {\n            // Direct route: 30 min wait\n            return {\n              stationId: \"101\",\n              stationName: \"South Ferry\",\n              updatedAt: now,\n              feedAge: 5,\n              northbound: [\n                {\n                  line: \"1\",\n                  direction: \"N\",\n                  arrivalTime: now + 1800,\n                  minutesAway: 30,\n                  isAssigned: true,\n                  isRerouted: false,\n                  isExpress: false,\n                  tripId: \"direct-slow\",\n                  destination: \"Test\",\n                  confidence: \"high\",\n                  feedName: \"test\",\n                  feedAge: 5,\n                },\n              ],\n              southbound: base + 0.2, base + 0.1] },\n    \"fav-2\": { line: \"A\", scores: [base + 0.1, base + 0.15, base + 0.05] },\n    \"fav-3\": { line: \"C\", scores: [base + 0.05, base + 0.08, base + 0.03] },\n  });\n    process.on(\"SIGTERM\", () => {\n      cleanup();\n      process.exit(0);\n    });\n  });\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    vi.clearAllMocks();\n    // Use frozen time for consistent test      expect(allLines).toContain(\"1\");\n      expect(allLines).toContain(\"2\");\n      expect(allLines).toContain(\"3\");\n      expect(allLines).toContain(\"A\");\n [\"1\"], direction: \"both\" },\n        { id: \"fav-2\", stationId: \"725\", lines: [\"A\"], direction: \"north\" },\n        { id: \"fav-3\", stationId: \"726\", lines: [\"C\"], direction: \"south\" },\n      ];\n\n      const morningScores: MorningScoreMap = {\n        \"fav-1\": { line: \"1\", scores: [0.9, 0.8, 0.7] }, // Highest\n        \"fav-2\": { line: \"A\", scores: [0.5, 0.4, 0.3] }, // Middle\n        \"fav-3\": { line: \"C\", scores: [0.2, 0.1, 0.05] }, // Lowest\n      };\n\n      const sorted = [...favorites].sort((a, b) => {\n        const scoreA = morningScores[a.id] ? morningScores[a.id]!.scores[0]! : 0;\n        const scoreB = morningScores[b.id] ? morningScores[b.id]!.scores[0]! : 0;\n        return scoreB - scoreA;\n      });\n\n      expect(sorted[0]?.id).toBe(\"fav-1\");\n      expect(sorted[1]?.id).toBe(\"fav-2\");\n      expect(sorted[2]?.id).toBe(\"fav-3\");\n    });\n  });\n\n  describe(\"Alert Integration\", () => {\n
